data.title: Synthetix’s sUSD Stablecoin Depegs to New Low of $0.66
data.description:
The Synthetix protocol stablecoin dropped to a new low this week, extending its month-long depegging trend.
source: https://decrypt.co/315338/synthetixs-susd-stablecoin-depegs-to-new-low-of-0-66

data.title: Crypto Rug Pulls Decline 66% in 2025, But Financial Impact Grows
data.description:
TL;DR Fewer but Deadlier: Despite a 66% drop in the number of rug pulls in 2025, losses have skyrocketed to nearly $6 billion from about $90 million last year. Major Impact from Single Event: The collapse of Mantra’s OM token alone accounts for 92% of the current losses, highlighting how one sophisticated scam can inflict. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-rug-pulls-decline-66-in-2025-but-financial-impact-grows/

data.title: One address has accumulated a profit of $108,000 by purchasing two recent Binance Wallet IDO projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, an address has accumulated a profit of $108,000 by purchasing Binance Wallet IDO projects in the past two times. It bought FHE at $0.05447 three days ago, with a return rate of 24.7%; and opened a BANK position at $0.01964 an hour ago, with a return rate of 93%.

data.title: Binance continues to lead the global spot market with a 45% market share in the first quarter of 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to TokenInsight data, Binance continued to rank first in the global spot market in the first quarter of 2025, with an average quarterly market share of 43.9%. It has steadily increased from 43.5% at the beginning of the year to 45% at the end of March, once again consolidating its position as the world's leading centralized exchange.

data.title: Italy: US Stablecoins Bigger Threat Than Tariffs
data.description:
Italy’s finance minister warns that U. S. stablecoins may threaten the euro’s global role more than trade tariffs, urging the EU to advance the digital euro to counter growing reliance on dollar-backed digital assets.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/italy-us-stablecoins-bigger-threat-than-tariffs

data.title: Galaxy Digital Floats Inflation Proposal While Withdrawing $58M in $SOL From Exchanges
data.description:
Solana’s 3rd-largest validator wants us to rethink how we vote on future proposals influencing $SOL inflation
source: https://solanafloor.com/news/galaxy-digital-floats-inflation-proposal-while-withdrawing-58-m-in-sol-from-exchanges

data.title: Synthetix announces contingency plan for sUSD depegging
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Synthetix launched an emergency solution for the sUSD stablecoin depegging, and will start the USD 420 pool and start the incentive mechanism after 36 hours. SNX mortgagees can deposit sUSD to participate and share a total of 5 million SNX rewards. The sUSD will be locked for one year and the rewards will be unlocked within three months after the event.
Synthetix founder Kain said this is "one of the worst instant solutions" designed to quickly create on-chain demand for sUSD. Previously, the price of sUSD once dropped to $0.70, a 24-hour drop of 13.9%, and has now rebounded to $0.83.

data.title: ANAP Buys $70 Million in Bitcoin for Treasury
data.description:
This decision underscores the growing trend of traditional businesses incorporating digital assets into their balance sheets. As more companies adopt Bitcoin as a reserve asset, the question arises.
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/anap-buys-70-million-in-bitcoin-for-treasury/

data.title: Backpack has distributed points for the fourth week of the first season today
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that the Backpack points activity has been going on for a month. According to the current data from Coingecko, the open interest on the Backpack platform is US$138 million, setting a new historical high, with a 7-day increase of 26.6% and a 30-day increase of 1,871.4%.
